summary: The diff implements comprehensive debugging and logging for the admin button visibility issue across frontend and backend components. All four requirements have corresponding implementations with extensive console logging, authentication state tracking, and backend verification logic.

hallucinated_features.description: Added console logging to frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts for URL parameter parsing and secret parameter handling
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement specified adding logging to URL parameter utilities. REQ-166 only requested logging in the Layout component for admin button rendering logic.

hallucinated_features.description: Added console logging to frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for user profile fetching and saving operations
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement specified adding logging to useQueries hook. REQ-166 only requested logging in the Layout component, and REQ-165 specified logging in useIsOwner hook.
